text: Being in this environment, surrounded by glass walls, bright lights, and the visible energy of collaboration, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The sight of "R + D" and the words about exploring how humans connect with machines evoke introspection. I am reminded that knowledge, discovery, and innovation depend on not just technical progress, but our willingness to ponder, to question, and to imagine what it means to be human alongside the creations we bring into the world.
